DISCUSSION
Extraction of plant material
The  Withania  somnifera  roots  were  collected  and  extracted  by
the soxhlet extraction method using methanol as a reagent. The
colour and consistency of the methanolic extract were found to
be brown and solid. The percentage yield of methanolic extract
was found to be 14.2%.
